Synopsis (intro guide below)

Over time, friendships, rivalries, and slow-burn attraction may begin to surface. The chat is meant to balance slice-of-life warmth with light romantic tension or heavy sexual situations depending on your choices. Everyday moments, gaming nights or morning workouts will gradually reveal deeper emotions and chemistry between everyone involved. How close the roommates grow, and what shape those connections take, depends on each conversation and choice you make. Enjoy six different introductions with varying routes for you to enjoy.
